---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: page-header
# Get in touch
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: contact-card
## Email

::: email-block
[connorconkeymorrison\@gmail.com](mailto:connorconkeymorrison@gmail.com){.email-address}
<button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyEmail(this)">Copy address</button>
:::

For research, teaching, clinical, or professional inquiries, email is the best point of contact. I aim to respond within a few business days.
:::

::: contact-card
## Academic profiles

::: profiles-grid
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0000-1020-2333){.profile-link}
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ZEvUL_kAAAAJ&hl=en){.profile-link}
[ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Connor-Conkey-Morrison){.profile-link}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/connorconkeymorrison){.profile-link}
[GitHub](https://github.com/ccicm){.profile-link}
:::
:::

::: cv-placeholder
**Curriculum Vitae**

A downloadable CV will be available here shortly.
:::

## Guestbook

Leave a note — questions, feedback, or just to say hello. You'll need a GitHub account to comment.

```{=html}
<div class="guestbook-wrapper">
  <!-- GISCUS: replace the script below with your own from giscus.app -->
  <!-- 
 <script src="https://giscus.app/client.js"
    data-repo="ccicm/cconkeymorrison"
    data-repo-id="REPO_ID"
    data-category="Announcements"
    data-category-id="CATEGORY_ID"
    data-mapping="pathname"
    data-strict="0"
    data-reactions-enabled="0"
    data-emit-metadata="0"
    data-input-position="top"
    data-theme="light"
    data-lang="en"
    crossorigin="anonymous"
    async>
  -->
   </script>
</div>
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<script src="https://giscus.app/client.js"
        data-repo="ccicm/cconkeymorrison"
        data-repo-id="R_kgDORggqZg"
        data-category="Announcements"
        data-category-id="DIC_kwDORggqZs4C37r4"
        data-mapping="pathname"
        data-strict="0"
        data-reactions-enabled="1"
        data-emit-metadata="0"
        data-input-position="top"
        data-theme="light"
        data-lang="en"
        data-loading="lazy"
        crossorigin="anonymous"
        async>
</script>
------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: about-section
This site was built with an open-source Quarto template. View the [setup guide](template.qmd) or grab the [template on GitHub](https://github.com/ccicm/academic-website-template).
:::

```{=html}
<script>
function copyEmail(btn) {
  navigator.clipboard.writeText('connorconkeymorrison@gmail.com').then(function() {
    btn.textContent = 'Copied!';
    btn.classList.add('copied');
    setTimeout(function() {
      btn.textContent = 'Copy address';
      btn.classList.remove('copied');
    }, 2000);
  });
}
</script>
```
